title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Backend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
